landing.heroSubtitle: No words. No keyboard. Just draw.
landing.forPatientsDesc: No words needed. Draw with hand gestures, sign in your language, and let AI translate your expression into the clinical evidence you deserve.
landing.gestureDrawingDesc: Point your finger at the webcam to draw. No mouse, no keyboard — just natural hand gestures.
landing.aiInsightDesc: Every drawing is analyzed in real-time for stress patterns, emotional markers, and clinical indicators.
landing.signModeDesc: Switch to sign language recognition. Your signs become words, your words become clinical notes.
landing.dividerCta: 10M+ nonverbal Americans are underdiagnosed. MindCanvas gives them a voice without words.
landing.stepDrawDesc: Use hand gestures to draw on your webcam. No mouse, no keyboard — just point and move.
landing.stepAnalyzeDesc: Real-time emotion detection, drawing pattern analysis, and clinical stress scoring — as you draw.
landing.stepHelpDesc: Instant SOAP notes, insurance pre-authorization, and clinical evidence — all from one session.

onboarding.consent: Just a few things before we begin.
onboarding.consentNonverbal: I am nonverbal or have limited speech
onboarding.consentData: I agree to share anonymized data for research
onboarding.consentDisclaimer: I understand this is a screening tool, not a diagnosis
onboarding.profileSub: Tell us your name so we can personalize your experience.

drawing.drawWithMouse: You can still draw with your mouse.
